Tool 'submit_flow' is registered. (Submit invoice, e-reporting, or CDAR to the Approved Platform)
Tool 'search_flows' is registered. (Search flows by criteria (status, type, period))
Tool 'get_flow' is registered. (Retrieve flow metadata or document by flowId)
Tool 'submit_lifecycle_status' is registered. (Emit CDAR lifecycle status (Refused, Approved, Cashed, etc.))
Tool 'healthcheck_flow' is registered. (Check Flow Service availability)
Tool 'search_company' is registered. (Search companies (SIRENs) in the PPF directory)
Tool 'get_company_by_siren' is registered. (Look up a company by SIREN)
Tool 'search_establishment' is registered. (Search establishments (SIRETs) in the PPF directory)
Tool 'get_establishment_by_siret' is registered. (Look up an establishment by SIRET)
Tool 'search_routing_code' is registered. (Search routing codes for a recipient)
Tool 'create_routing_code' is registered. (Create a routing code for a SIRET)
Tool 'update_routing_code' is registered. (Update an existing routing code)
Tool 'search_directory_line' is registered. (Search directory lines (receiving addresses))
Tool 'get_directory_line' is registered. (Look up a directory line by addressing identifier)
Tool 'create_directory_line' is registered. (Create a directory line (receiving address))
Tool 'update_directory_line' is registered. (Update an existing directory line)
Tool 'delete_directory_line' is registered. (Delete a directory line)
